name: Lunokhod 1
tagline: First wheeled vehicle to roam another world
description: The first wheeled vehicle to roam another world. Operated for ten months on the Moon’s Mare Imbrium between November 1970 and September 1971, driven via radio link by a five-person team in Crimea. A pressurised "tub" warmed by a polonium heater overnight.
best_known_for: First wheeled vehicle to roam another world
